name: Feature Stability and Narrow Mobile Fix
fixes: Admin publishing and moderation test actions are deterministic
Personalization has a safe delayed-data fallback mount
Smart Alerts signals readiness only after trigger and panel mount
Mobile navigation tests wait on the real readiness signal
Overview and Board are hardened for 280px and 320px widths
browser_execution: Not executed in this sandbox because Chromium navigation to localhost is blocked by administrator policy. GitHub Actions will run the full Playwright matrix.
isolated_audit_note: The packaged snapshot intentionally omits live data.js and community.js, so isolated audit reports those runtime files as missing. The changed-files package does not delete or overwrite them in the live repository.
